common_stage_patterns.overview: This guide provides complete, production-ready stage patterns for common Bob integration scenarios in Jenkins pipelines. Each pattern includes error handling, output formatting, and archiving best practices using the correct askBob helper signature.

pattern.name: pr_review_stage
pattern.description: Analyze pull request changes for code quality, security, and best practices
pattern.when_to_use: - On pull request builds - Before merging to main branch - As part of code review process

pattern.name: test_failure_analysis_stage
pattern.description: Analyze test failures to identify root causes and suggest fixes
pattern.when_to_use: - After test stage fails - To diagnose flaky tests - To understand test failure patterns

pattern.name: security_scan_stage
pattern.description: Perform security analysis on code changes or entire codebase
pattern.when_to_use: - Before production deployments - On schedule (nightly security scans) - After dependency updates

pattern.name: build_failure_diagnosis_stage
pattern.description: Diagnose build failures and suggest fixes
pattern.when_to_use: - After compilation fails - When build errors are unclear - To identify dependency issues

pattern.name: comprehensive_analysis_stage
pattern.description: Perform comprehensive analysis combining multiple aspects (changes, tests, build)
pattern.when_to_use: - For important releases - When multiple issues are present - For thorough pre-merge analysis

guideline.name: adjust_timeouts
guideline.description: Adjust timeout values based on your codebase size and Bob response times

guideline.name: customize_prompts
guideline.description: Tailor prompts to your project's specific needs and standards

guideline.name: adjust_error_handling
guideline.description: Modify error handling based on how critical Bob analysis is

options.option: UNSTABLE: Analysis is informational, don't block pipeline
FAILURE: Analysis is important, mark build as failed but continue
ABORTED: Analysis is critical, stop pipeline on failure

guideline.name: combine_patterns
guideline.description: Combine multiple patterns in a single pipeline

pattern_summary.item: pr_review_stage - Analyze code changes in pull requests

key_points.point: Always capture askBob return value: def analysis = askBob(prompt, mode)
Use triple-quoted strings for multi-line prompts
Add clear console banners for visibility
